site: ocblstraining.github.io
name: Orange County BLS Training
instructor: Sepi Reissmueller
role: AHA-authorized BLS & ACLS Instructor, ER Nurse at UC Irvine Medical Center
purpose: BLS and ACLS certification courses in Orange County, CA
courses: AHA BLS Provider, AHA ACLS Provider — hybrid format (online coursework + in-person skills check)
certification: AHA eCards, valid for 2 years
audience: healthcare professionals, students, individuals, companies
contact: email form on site
